module.name: src
module.purpose: Rust workspace source root for Marix crates with flat Cargo crate layout. It organizes reusable common config/external re-export/logging/protocol/structure modules, agent model/session/task orchestration, client session/event surfaces, and host-side tool execution stubs while Cargo manifests define crate wiring.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model backend abstractions, Session and SessionContext runtime orchestration, and the implemented task runtime. The model backend abstraction exposes only a send interface bridged by a blanket impl and includes an implemented Deepseek streaming backend; the task module now implements Task, which drives model steps and streams status to the client, backed by the new shared TaskContext state that now also owns the shared tokio runtime task workers block_on.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client crate namespace for user-facing session commands, client events, and channel endpoints that communicate with the agent through shared SessionEvent values.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared common crate namespace with reusable config, now-public crate-local external re-export adapters that let downstream crates route third-party access through common, logging, protocol models, and structural data/channel interfaces.

childModules.name: host
childModules.purpose: Host crate namespace for agent channel connection stubs and an Executor-owned tool preview, execution, status-query, cancel, kill, and update interface.
